configurations.name: incentivos-preview
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),url=require('url');const MIME={'.html':'text/html','.css':'text/css','.js':'application/javascript','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.jpeg':'image/jpeg','.gif':'image/gif','.webp':'image/webp','.ico':'image/x-icon','.json':'application/json','.woff':'font/woff','.woff2':'font/woff2','.pdf':'application/pdf','.csv':'text/csv'};const PORT=process.env.PORT||4500;http.createServer((req,res)=>{let p=url.parse(req.url).pathname;if(p==='/') p='/index.html';let f=path.join('/Users/dvargas/Desktop/naowee-test-incentivos-demo',p);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found: '+f);}else{const ext=path.extname(f).toLowerCase();res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':MIME[ext]||'text/plain'});res.end(d);}});}).listen(PORT,()=>console.log('Incentivos server on '+PORT));
